calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petitioners Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Aug-12-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PETITIONER NOREEN CORRY'S Petition For Writ Of Mandate is OFF CALENDAR for Dept. 302 only. This motion is transferred to Department 501, to be heard on the same date and time. Department 501 addresses all landlord-tenant matters.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, Bus. Tel: 530-339-5023, email: rhunter@sftc.org. (D302)

Hearing On Petitioner'S Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Aug-12-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Bradley Kass, (650)549-0612 for Petitioner/Moving party Noreen Corry.
Wayne Snodgrass, 9415)554-4675 for Rent Stablization and Arbitration Board.

Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Hearing On Petitioner's Petition For Writ Of Mandate is DENIED. Administrative Law Judge did not abuse her discretion, there was a fair trial and findings are supported by the evidence. Order signed in Open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petitioners Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Jun-10-2016 Continued To Aug-12-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
